response.rule: Number of connected set partitions (sequence begins 1,1,1,2,5,16,...).
Linear recurrence inferred from the prefix.
Recursive continuation of the nested order-three recurrence visible in the prefix.
Compact alternating recurrence inferred from the prefix.
a(n)=n·a(n-1)+(-1)^n p(n+1), where p(k) is the kth prime.
Odd positions are Catalan numbers; even positions are powers of 3.
a(n)=n^5+p(n+1), where p(k) is the kth prime.
Alternating polynomial recurrence inferred from the prefix.
